title: Movie Theater ZOMG WTF
wikitext:
[]: Movie Theater: ZOMG WTF!?             Quote Post by Nukie » Tue Jan 23, 2007 9:32 pm Rei (voice): So, you can only find happiness in your dreams. Shinji (voice): Then, this isn't reality... this world where no one exists. Rei (voice): Yes, it's a dream. Shinji (voice): So, I'm not here either. Rei (voice): You were trying to remake reality with convenient fantasies. Shinji (voice): Is that wrong? Rei (voice): You were using fabrications to escape from reality. Shinji (voice): Can't I dream alone? Rei (voice): That would not be a dream. It would just be compensating for reality. (Packed theater -> empty theater) Shinji (voice): Then... where is my dream? Rei (voice): It is the continuation of reality. Shinji (voice): Where is... my reality? Rei (voice): It is at the end of your dream. 7 MILLION FLASHING IMAGES AND GNR'S NECK ASPLODE I just rewatched EoE, and found myself, again, scratching my head. What a crazy scene! Although I (sort of) understand what is being talked about here, what is the significance of the theater? One more question-were the drawings shown after the strangulation scene the same ones shown in Asuka's mind rape?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed Jan 24, 2007 12:49 am It's a meta-commentary on why we watch anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed Jan 24, 2007 4:57 am It's kind of meant to be the audience looking at themselves. And no, there are no drawings in Asuka's "mind rape".

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Jan 24, 2007 6:31 am Szmitten wrote: And no, there are no drawings in Asuka's "mind rape".

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed Jan 24, 2007 10:09 am So they are. Whoops.

[]: Re: Movie Theater: ZOMG WTF!?             Quote Post by Rawinder » Wed Jan 24, 2007 4:19 pm Nukie wrote: Shinji (voice): Then... where is my dream? Rei (voice): It is the continuation of reality. Shinji (voice): Where is... my reality? Rei (voice): It is at the end of your dream.

[]: Re: Movie Theater: ZOMG WTF!?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 24, 2007 10:02 pm Rawinder wrote: Has anyone ever been able to deciper this? It still makes absolutely no sense to me and seems (along with most of Shinji and Rei's conversation) completely irrelevant to what's actually going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Thu Jan 25, 2007 7:55 am It's quite intelligent what Anno tries to explain.... Reality is what we humans create (now atm its kinda getting boring because of lack of imagination....). When Rei says "at the end of your dreams"... i got the feeling it's like when you find happyness of living (a dreams gives happy tought in a world that is created by your psych). That's a question i've been questioning already 2 years ... why do humanity live. It's for teh sake of finding happyness. We can create a world of happyness.... nice anarchistic toughts. At least hes trying to give the message of peace in his series, even if herefuse to tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 25, 2007 4:00 pm Nukie wrote: One more question-were the drawings shown after the strangulation scene the same ones shown in Asuka's mind rape?

[]: Re: Movie Theater: ZOMG WTF!?             Quote Post by kaos » Thu Jan 25, 2007 5:31 pm Shinji (voice): Then... where is my dream? Rei (voice): It is the continuation of reality. Shinji (voice): Where is... my reality? Rei (voice): It is at the end of your dream.

Shinji (voice): Can't I dream alone? Rei (voice): That would not be a dream. It would just be compensating for reality. (Packed theater -> empty theater) Shinji (voice): Then... where is my dream? Rei (voice): It is the continuation of reality. Shinji (voice): Where is... my reality?
